allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./src/lib/competition-utils.js'\).then\(async m => { const d = await m.loadCompetitionData\(\); console.log\('Top-level keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\); }\)")
Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('/tmp/orig.json', 'utf8'\)\); console.log\('Original keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/lib/competition-utils.js'\).then\(async m => { const d = await m.loadCompetitionData\(\); console.log\('Loaded keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\('Competition count:', d.competitions.length\); await m.saveCompetitionData\(d\); const d2 = await m.loadCompetitionData\(\); console.log\('After save keys:', Object.keys\(d2\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/lib/competition-utils.js'\).then\(async m => { const d = await m.loadCompetitionData\(\); d.competitions.forEach\(\(c, i\) => console.log\(String\(i+1\).padStart\(2\) + '. ' + c.name + \(c.isActive === false ? ' [inactive]' : ''\)\)\); }\)")

PowerShell($ua = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"; $headers = @{ 'Accept' = 'text/html'; 'Referer' = 'https://www.hockeyvictoria.org.au/' }; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.hockeyvictoria.org.au/pointscore/26185/42443" -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent $ua -Headers $headers; $idx = $resp.Content.IndexOf\('Footscray Blue'\); $resp.Content.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0, $idx - 200\), 400\))

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('weekly-fixture/data/season.json', 'utf8'\)\); for \(const t of d.teams\) { if \(t.name.includes\(\\"35+ B\\"\) || t.name.includes\(\\"Women's 45+\\"\)\) { console.log\(t.label, '|', t.name, '| view=' + t.view, '| events=' + t.events.length\); if \(t.events.length > 0\) { console.log\('  first:', t.events[0].dtstart, t.events[0].home, 'vs', t.events[0].away\); console.log\('  last: ', t.events[t.events.length-1].dtstart\); } } }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('temp/scores.json', 'utf8'\)\); const targets = new Set\(\); for \(const g of \(d.games || []\)\) targets.add\(g.competition\); const list = [...targets].sort\(\); console.log\('Distinct competition names in scores.json:'\); list.forEach\(n => console.log\('  ' + n\)\); console.log\('\\\\nTotal games:', \(d.games || []\).length\); console.log\('Generated:', d.generatedAt\);")

PowerShell($ua = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"; $headers = @{ 'Referer' = 'https://www.hockeyvictoria.org.au/' }; $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.hockeyvictoria.org.au/games/team/25879/412294" -UseBasicParsing -UserAgent $ua -Headers $headers; $cards = $resp.Content -split '<div\\s+class="card card-hover mb-4">'; for \($i = 1; $i -lt $cards.Length; $i++\) { $card = $cards[$i].Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(2500, $cards[$i].Length\)\); if \($card -match '\(?i\)\(FF|FL|forfeit\)'\) { "==== Card $i ===="; $card; break } })
